_README: Single source of truth for the recorded-voice replay harness. Privacy-safe: coordinates/text/SHA-256 only -- NO audio lives here. Consumer contract: {clip_dir, clips:[...], barge:[...], barge_cases:[...]}. The extractor writes gitignored <clip_dir>/<id>.wav (16 kHz mono 16-bit PCM) plus a JSON sidecar. Timestamps are seconds into logs/runs/<run>.wav on the WAV timeline; extraction adds 100 ms pre/post padding. SHA-256 pins the exact local waveform. Consumers self-skip absent source/extracted audio, so a clean checkout stays CI-green. Windows were verified through the real Sherpa recognizer; barge_cases explicitly pair same-session base and overlap clips.

clips.expected_text: Can you tell me a story
